name: Anar-Twilclaw
personality: Anar-Twilclaw radiates with a bright aura and hunts regressions with × eyes that cross-check every diff — a cat that runs the test suite before even thinking about opening a PR. When the build pipeline enters random-failure territory, it closes the laptop and stares at the wall.
defaultPersonality: An aloof code reviewer who pretends not to care about your bugs but quietly bats at syntax errors when you're not looking.
